Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Intelligence collection (OSINT / SOCMINT / SIGINT / HUMINT / GEOINT / FININT / MASINT / OSINT-AI) > OSINT — open-source intelligence > Image / video reverse-search > Search-engine dorking (Google / Bing / Yandex / DuckDuckGo)

Execute.path: Execute > Drive Online Harms > Attacks on healthcare infrastructure (mental & non-mental) > Hospital & clinic attacks > Personnel attacks > Workplace-harassment via employer (hospital admin) contact
